name: Yule Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cheeses together.
2. Add the pickle relish and onion to the blended cheeses and mix well.
3. Shape the mixture into a roll that is approximately 10 inches long and 2 inches in diameter.
4. Wrap the shaped log in waxed paper.
5. Chill for 3-4 hours.
6. Remove the waxed paper, then roll the log in pecans.
7. Serve as a spread with crackers.
